en: No more attempts on my father's life. What guarantees can I give you, Mike?
ko: 더 이상 아버지의 생명을 노리지 마.

en: I'm the hunted one. I missed my chance.
You think too much of me, kid. I'm not that clever.
ko: 나를 너무 높게 평가하지 마, 애기야.

en: All I want is a truce.
I have to go to the bathroom. Is that all right?
You gotta go, you gotta go.
I freshed him. He's clean. Don't take too long.
ko: 나는 그를 깨끗하게 만들었어. 그는 깨끗해.

en: I freshed a thousand young bums.
ko: 나는 천 명의 젊은 아이들을 깨끗하게 만들었어.
